_comment: LOCAL FIXTURE / MANUAL ENTRY for the weekly generator's ClassPlanProvider. Until Slack PDF ingestion is wired (spec Section 5, Phase 2 step 5), the week's class plan is supplied here, mirroring how data/maxes.fixture.json stands in for the Sheet. Stimulus tags drive deconfliction; per-piece percentages drive the deterministic load calc (loads are NEVER hardcoded here). Source: Claremont Competitors Programming PDF, week of 8-14 Jun 26 (Week 8 of their cycle).

sessions.title: Weightlifting + Performance
movements: B. Low Hang Power Clean — 3 waves: 2 @ 80%, 1 @ 90% (+3 rebounding jumps/set)
C. Push Press: 5 @ 75%, 4 @ 80%, 3 @ 85%, 5+ @ 75% (+ Glute Ham Raise 3x10)
Performance: Back-Rack Step-Ups + DB OH Walk; chipper — 50 DL / 50 box jump / 25 strict HSPU / 50-40 echo bike / 50 FS @60kg

sessions.title: WOD — engine + gymnastics pulling
movements: A. 20 min AMRAP: 3 rounds (400m run / 15 pull-ups) into 2 rounds (300m run / 10 C2B) into AMRAP (200m run / 5 bar MU)
B. 21 min alt OTM x10: hanging tuck hold / seated straddle leg lifts
Comp extras: Sorensen / GHD side plank / back ext quality; Front Squat Dips — build to heavy 3 then 5x2 @80%

sessions.title: Weightlifting (squat + snatch)
movements: B. Power Snatch: 5 x 1 @ 85-90%, then build to a 3RM
WOD (optional): kickstand RDL + zercher jumps; row ladder for total time

sessions.title: WOD — gymnastics (bar series) + partner metcon
movements: A. Gymnastics Cycle Wk1 — Bar Series: straight-arm pulling (ball-ups, front-lever inverted hang, kip extensions)
B. 16 min AMRAP: kip extensions / ball-ups / candlesticks / thoracic rotation / parallette traverse
Comp class: Weighted Pull-Ups 6x4 @20%; max-unbroken BW pull-up set; pairs — T2B / burpee box get-over / HS walk

sessions.title: Weightlifting + Performance
movements: C. Snatch & Clean — 10 OTM @ 70% (full snatch :00, full clean :30)
D. 4 rounds alt 90s: BB Z-press / prone rows / weighted GHD hip ext
Performance: pairs 10 rds (300m run / DB lunge / 5 strict HSPU); max-cal ski to 30 min
